creator: utisoft@gmail.com
text:
This is a Java docking framework for use in cross-platform Swing applications, and is depended on by Scilab 5+. It offers features you'd expect in any desktop docking framework such as:

 * Tabbed and Split Layouts
 * Drag-n-Drop capability
       (with native drag rubber band painting on some platforms)
 * Floating windows
 * Collapsible Containers to Save Real Estate
 * Layout Persistence

Fix: 

-- 
This message has been scanned for viruses and
dangerous content by MailScanner, and is
believed to be clean.--VezMlybVLhie4g8Qts2prIwQywd0SBXJXAtfeWNbhb9Tnj4O

echo c - x11-toolkits/flexdock
mkdir -p x11-toolkits/flexdock > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - x11-toolkits/flexdock/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >x11-toolkits/flexdock/pkg-descr << '815fe2884ca6ca535666de4dd610258e'
XFlexDock is a Java docking framework for use in cross-platform Swing
Xapplications. It offers features you'd expect in any desktop docking framework
Xsuch as:
X
X * Tabbed and Split Layouts
X * Drag-n-Drop capability
X	(with native drag rubber band painting on some platforms)
X * Floating windows
X * Collapsible Containers to Save Real Estate
X * Layout Persistence
X
XIt is released using the MIT license.
X
XWWW: https://flexdock.dev.java.net/
815fe2884ca6ca535666de4dd610258e

sed 's/^X//' >x11-toolkits/flexdock/distinfo << '153f22aa05185957557451c57922ce2b'
XMD5 (flexdock-0.5.1-src.zip) = 88fd43d7d8db92e9480200c316e55056
XSHA256 (flexdock-0.5.1-src.zip) = 2ffc4b2bf3fd2b070aff3ec46b6a3d3dbbe4f2e666b12ee266cbc162e27f890b

X# New ports collection Makefile for:	flexdock
X# Date created:		September 2009
X# Whom:			Chris Rees
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	flexdock
XPORTVERSION=	0.5.1
XCATEGORIES=	x11-toolkits java
XMASTER_SITES=	https://flexdock.dev.java.net/files/documents/2037/52480/ \
X		http://www.bayofrum.net/dist/flexdock/
XEXTRACT_SUFX=	-src.zip
X
XMAINTAINER=	utisoft@gmail.com
XCOMMENT=	A Java docking framework for cross-platform Swing applications
X
XNO_WRKSUBDIR=	yes
XUSE_ZIP=	yes
XUSE_JAVA=	yes
XUSE_ANT=	yes
XALL_TARGET=	jar
X
XJAR_NAME="${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}.jar"
X
Xdo-install:
X	${MKDIR} ${JAVAJARDIR}
X	${INSTALL_DATA} "${WRKSRC}/build/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}.jar" ${JAVAJARDIR}/${PORTNAME}.jar
X	${MKDIR} ${JAVALIBDIR}/lib
X	(cd ${WRKSRC}/build/ && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} lib ${JAVALIBDIR})
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
bf92bfbff4e1001129caf89235b5e3c8
